name: a-horde-o-bees
description: Agent authoring discipline and a git development-cycle toolkit, distributed as one plugin. Add with no ref to track main; add with `@vX.Y.Z` to pin a release.

plugins.name: skills
plugins.description: Agent authoring and interaction discipline (prose, descriptions, process flows, rules, markdown, honesty, confirm-shared-intent), a git development-cycle toolkit (commit, push, PR lifecycle, CI, checkpoint, release), and a transcripts query tool.
